title: Consolidated Data Model
description: Consolidated entity schemas from data model files

catalog_system_id.description: Stable slug for this catalog (e.g. scott, michel, facit, sg).

name.description: Full name of the catalog or reference work.

abbreviation.description: Short label shown in UI or listings (e.g. Mi., Sc., SG).

notes.description: Edition notes, regional scope, or usage caveats.

catalog_system.description: Reference system used for catalog numbers on individual stamps; one row per system you track.

country_id.description: Stable identifier; prefer ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 when practical, otherwise a short mnemonic slug (e.g. dk, ddr).

display_name.description: Human-readable country or postal administration name.

notes.description: Optional clarifications (colonies, period splits, obsolete administrations).

country.description: Normalized territory for cataloging, filtering, and joins; identifiers should remain stable across inventory and listings.

series_id.description: Stable unique id for this series within the catalog.

country_id.description: Primary issuing country or administration for this series.

name.description: Display name of the set or series (e.g. 1875 bicolors, Europa 1980).

description.description: Scope, catalog cross-references, or how stamps are grouped in this series.

year_from.description: First year of issue represented in this series, if applicable.

year_to.description: Last year of issue for multi-year series; omit for single-year or ongoing.

parent_series_id.description: Optional parent series for nested grouping (e.g. country definitives under a broad program).

issue_series.description: Groups stamps into sets, definitive series, commemoratives, or specialized series for browsing and pricing context.

listing_id.description: Surrogate primary key for this listing row.

target_price.description: Guide or asking price as a decimal in listing_currency.

listing_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for target_price (e.g. USD, EUR, DKK).

listing.description: Separate from philatelic attributes on stamp; omit when no price is tracked or use multiple rows for history or multi-channel asks.

stamp_id.description: Unique id (SKU, upload basename, or UUID).

issue_series_id.description: Stamp set or series this item belongs to, when known.

title.description: Short title or working label (often aligned with listing title).

summary.description: Identification notes, variety callouts, or catalog commentary.

issue_year.description: Primary year of issue for this stamp or single-stamp lot.

issue_year_to.description: End year for multi-year issues or sets represented by one row.

condition_quality.description: Overall condition or gum state for mint/used grading.

centering_grade.description: Centering and margin balance for perforated issues, using the ladder common on eBay and in US expertizing (PSE, Philatelic Foundation): Gem/Superb through Fine/VF/XF slash grades (e.g. VF/XF, F-VF), then VG/Good/Average/Poor. MNH/NH/LH describe gum, not centering—use condition_quality for those.

perforation.description: Perforation description (e.g. perf 11½, comb 13¾, imperforate, roulette).

image_basename.description: Image file name in uploads/ or media store.

freeform_keywords.description: Ad-hoc keywords not yet mapped to thematic_tag.

stamp.description: Core record: country of issue, year, physical attributes (perforation, centering), condition, optional series membership; catalog numbers, thematic tags, and optional pricing (listing entity) use child rows.

catalog_line_id.description: Surrogate primary key for this catalog line.

catalog_system_id.description: Which catalog system the number belongs to.

catalog_number.description: Number as printed in the catalog (e.g. 85a, 123 II, 4y).

supplement_notes.description: Specialized catalog notes, plate blocks, or variety suffixes.

stamp_catalog_number.description: Stores Scott, Michel, Facit, etc. numbers per stamp; a stamp may have multiple rows for different systems or supplements.

thematic_link_id.description: Surrogate primary key for this assignment.

role.description: How this tag relates to other tags on the same stamp.

confidence.description: Optional model or human confidence 0.0–1.0 for ML-assisted tagging.

notes.description: Rationale or caveats for this thematic assignment.

stamp_thematic_tag.description: Many-to-many link; supports primary vs secondary topical roles and free-text rationale.

tag_id.description: Stable slug for the tag (e.g. topical-ships, royalty-crowns).

name.description: Short label shown in filters and listings.

description.description: What designs or subjects belong under this tag.

thematic_tag.description: Normalized tags for ships, royalty, Olympics, etc.; optional parent builds a shallow hierarchy.

change.description: Change log entry describing a versioned modification to the consolidated data model or data.

git_commit_hash.description: Git commit hash corresponding to this change
